name: direct-shading-overrides-conditional
description: Table style with firstRow conditional (blue 4472C4 shading). Cell (0,0) has direct green (00B050) shading in tcPr.
expected_behavior: Cell (0,0): green (00B050) from direct, NOT blue from conditional. Cell (0,1): blue (4472C4) from conditional (no direct shading). Cell (1,0), (1,1): no shading (not in first row).
